item.title: Version 1.1
item.description:
What's New in v1.1

  • macOS 13+ support — Now runs on Intel Macs with macOS Ventura and later
  • FFF/RAW fix — Hasselblad 16-bit RAW files now display correctly on Intel Macs (no more mosaics or black images)
  • Reset button — Clear bad ML detection and place corners manually
  • Click-to-relocate — Select a corner, click anywhere to move it
  • Corner cycling — Clustered corners cycle TL/TR/BR/BL on click
  • Auto-updates — Future updates install with one click (Check for Updates in app menu)
  • Version display — Version number shown in toolbar
  • Changelog popup — What's New shown on first launch after update
  • Properly signed & notarized — No more Gatekeeper warnings
